title: Savory Juicy Canadian Bean Stir-fry
description: This savory and juicy Canadian bean dish features a monsoon-inspired blend of mustard seeds for extra flavor in a gluten-free-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 1 cup green beans, trimmed
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are fresh and crisp.

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add mustard seeds and sauté until they start to pop, about 30 seconds.
Stir in garlic, ginger, and onion. Cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
If using red curry paste, add it now and stir well.
Add green beans and cook, tossing occasionally, until tender-crisp, about 5-7 minutes.
Drizzle lime juice over the top and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
